message:
wa-a0c.5: comprehensive simulation tests (mock correctness + scenario coverage)

Add 23 new tests: 6 mock correctness tests (content isolation, resize,
multi-spawn, kill/split edge cases) and 17 scenario tests (multi-pane
execution, markers, expectations, file loading, YAML round-trip,
duration edge cases, error conditions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
